outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/adadas.R
+++ b/adadas.R
@@ -10,9 +10,9 @@
   merge(adas, by = c("USUBJID", "VISIT"), all.x = TRUE) %>%
   # Calculate change from baseline
   mutate(
-    CHG = BASE - AVAL,
-    PCHG = if_else(BASE != 0, (BASE - AVAL) / AVAL * 100, NA_real_),
-    ANL01FL = "Y"
+    CHG = AVAL - BASE,
+    PCHG = if_else(BASE != 0, (AVAL - BASE) / BASE * 100, NA_real_),
+    ANL01FL = if_else(PARAMCD %in% c("ADASCOG", "ADASTOT"), "Y", "")
   ) %>```
